figures.caption: Fig. 2. Architecture of PBSeg. The backbone extracts features from the input image; the multi-scale decoder upsamples features to recover high-resolution representations; the transformer decoder takes as input a set of learnable object embeddings and the high-resolution features and produces refined queries for inference.

Fig. 1. Illustration of the main challenges in low-altitude UAV semantic segmentation. (a) Strong scale variation with small objects embedded in largescale urban layouts. (b) Complex boundaries and crowded regions make small instances difficult to segment reliably. (c) Trade-off between segmentation accuracy and computational cost on UAVid.
